title: Split System.IO; add console and concurrency packages

source.subject: corelib: split System.IO, add console/concurrency packages and tests

body:
## Outcome

Corelib: split System.IO, add console/concurrency packages and tests.

## Context

- Workstream **codegen-runtime** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Fibers, channels, and GC runtime** (`v02-concurrency-runtime`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`09ac8fe`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/09ac8fe) — corelib: split System.IO, add console/concurrency packages and tests
